notes: The fixture hardcodes the Lattice base URL to http://localhost:8080 in LatticeClientConfig.java.
The fixture ships in-process mock Lattice controllers, so the default app topology points the SDK back at itself rather than at Zorn.
The required local Maven lattice-sdk artifact is present.
